# Attendee Registration

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Status:** planned
> **Provenance:** 3P
> **Derives From:** `ddd`

Demand-side registration and ticketing for a SUPPORTING context. Handled by external vendor (Unity Event Solutions). 8,600 attendees (2025), 85% first-timers. Growth comes from market expansion, not retention. Standard event ticketing — buy, don't build.

---

## Overview

Attendees are the value proposition to exhibitors, not the primary revenue source (13%). The registration pattern is straightforward: register → ticket → badge → check-in. Unity Event Solutions handles the entire flow externally.

The interesting signal is ticket type mix — trade pass growth (20% surge in 2025) indicates strengthening B2B engagement, which directly supports exhibitor value proposition.

## Capabilities

- attendee-registration-processing
- ticket-type-management
- badge-generation
- check-in-processing

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Attendee count | checked_in | >= 8,600 |
| Trade pass growth | YoY % change | > 10% |
| Check-in rate | checked_in / registered | >= 85% |
| ARPU | ticket_revenue / attendees | >= $32 |

## Related Patterns

- `event-edition-lifecycle` — attendee registration is stage 3 (Market Show) of the edition
- `attendee-demand-analytics` — measures this pattern
